name: bsky-ai-feed
description: Self-hosted Bluesky custom feed curated for posts genuinely about AI

scripts.check: pnpm --filter "./packages/*" run build:self && vp check && pnpm --filter "./packages/*" --filter "./apps/*" run check
scripts.dev: bash -c 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; pnpm run dev:feed & pnpm run dev:ingest & wait'
scripts.start: bash -c 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; pnpm --filter @bsky-ai-feed/feed-server start & pnpm --filter @bsky-ai-feed/ingest start & wait'
